# MarkdownRenderer

Renders a Markdown string to sanitized HTML. Fenced code blocks can be intercepted by plugins — Svelte components that receive the raw code block text and render it as live UI (charts, tables, diagrams) instead of highlighted source.

## Import

```javascript
import { MarkdownRenderer } from '@rokkit/ui'
```

## Quick Start

```svelte
<script>
  import { MarkdownRenderer } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<MarkdownRenderer markdown="# Hello\n\nThis is **Markdown**." />
```

HTML is sanitized with DOMPurify before rendering.

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `markdown` | `string` | — | Markdown source string |
| `plugins` | `MarkdownPlugin[]` | `[]` | Code block plugins — intercept fenced blocks by language tag |

## Plugins

```svelte
<script>
  import { MarkdownRenderer } from '@rokkit/ui'
  import { PlotPlugin, TablePlugin, MermaidPlugin } from '@rokkit/blocks'
</script>

<MarkdownRenderer {markdown} plugins={[PlotPlugin, TablePlugin, MermaidPlugin]} />
```

| Plugin | Language | Renders |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `PlotPlugin` | `plot` | `PlotChart` / `FacetPlot` from `@rokkit/chart` |
| `TablePlugin` | `table` | `Table` from `@rokkit/ui` |
| `SparklinePlugin` | `sparkline` | `Sparkline` from `@rokkit/chart` |
| `MermaidPlugin` | `mermaid` | Mermaid diagram |

## Custom Plugin

```javascript
import MyWidget from './MyWidget.svelte'

export const MyPlugin = {
  language: 'widget',          // matches ```widget fenced blocks
  component: MyWidget          // receives { code: string } as props
}
```

## Related

- [Blocks](/llms/packages/blocks.txt) — `@rokkit/blocks` plugin package
- [Code](/llms/components/code.txt) — static syntax-highlighted code block
